title: phlomis ornata
intro: Phlomis ornata, also known as Jerusalem sage, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its attractive, fragrant leaves and clusters of tubular flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, due to its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phlomis ornata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Phlomis ornata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
